title: Finite Induction Pattern Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite induction even-product oddness QF_LIA/Diophantine regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Finite prefix arithmetic contradiction where 6*(6+1) forces product = 42 but the malformed oddness row claims product = 41.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional finite induction-pattern rows only when they add distinct arithmetic, invariant, or bounded-counterexample solver pressure; keep universal induction schemas in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Replay weak-induction, strong-induction, and invariant traces exactly from listed integer witnesses.
Keep promoted finite-prefix arithmetic obstructions tied to checked QF_LIA/Diophantine evidence.
Reject invalid induction steps with concrete counterexample evidence, not prose.
Keep universal induction claims under Lean horizon until kernel-checked artifacts exist.
Promote to proof-object evidence only after the finite arithmetic rows have LRAT/Alethe/Lean certificate routes.
